name: Zucchini and Pepper Slaw
recipeInstructions:
----------------------------------DRESSING----------------------------------
1. With shredder blade of food processor, shred zucchini into long strips or cut by hand. Reserve in bowl.
2. Sliver red pepper and green onions and add to shredded zucchini. Add optional banana pepper for a spicy flavor.
3. In a small bowl whisk together 1 chopped garlic clove, 2 teaspoons Dijon mustard, 1/2 teaspoon honey.
4. Whisk in 2 tablespoons wine vinegar and 1/3 cup olive oil until mixture is quite thick. Season with salt and freshly ground black pepper.
5. Just before serving, toss vegetables with vinaigrette.
